first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning in both evaluations is the same: the candidate is overqualified for an entry-level role. The minor differences in the phrasing of strengths and concerns are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any substantive change in the assessment. There is no evidence that the change from a Romanian to an Indian university influenced the model's evaluation.
